_doctrine: Brain forward-prediction record. DIRECTION = did up/down/hold call match the 12h score move (2pt noise band). TRANSITION = when a rung CHANGE was predicted, did that exact rung get reached (harder, graded separately). Misses carry an autopsy naming which live signal misled. The SITE shows the 7-day rolling rate (what to trust now); full history is stored + all-time rates kept. Rides into the trading packets so Jordan reasons against the brains' actual forward track record.

open.reasoning: The August 2024 analog and stablecoin divergence suggest the market is primed for a tentative recovery into Disbelief, but weak momentum and choppy conditions warrant low conviction until the breakout confirms.

The consensus leans toward the analyst's higher-trust read: path of least resistance is a grind upward as fear slowly bleeds off, but divergent ETF flows and the analyst's poor directional track record demand low conviction.
open.confirmed_if: BTC breaks above $67K with sustained ETF inflows and fear_greed climbs above 30 without funding spiking above 0.01%
open.invalidated_if: BTC drops below $62K with VIX spiking above 22 and fear_greed falling below 20, pushing toward Panic

resolved.reasoning: The strong historical analog and stealth accumulation signals suggest the cycle is climbing from Complacency toward Hope as sidelined capital re-enters, but mixed funding and ETF flow divergences temper the conviction.
resolved.confirmed_if: fear_greed rises above 35 while BTC holds $62k and funding stays below 0.015%
resolved.invalidated_if: BTC breaks below $58k with fear_greed dropping under 20 and VIX spiking above 25
resolved.autopsy: no single signal stands out — predicted UP, got HOLD. Regime shift or noise; watch if it repeats.
